description:
A junior examiner submitted a flawed preliminary forensic report. As a senior investigator, independently verify their findings using Autopsy, identify all factual errors, and produce a corrected evidence summary. Analyze the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd in a new case named 'Peer_Review_Audit_2024' (Case Number: INV-PRA-006) and compare your findings against the claims in /home/ga/evidence/preliminary_findings.txt. Utilize File Type Identification and Hash Lookup modules for the analysis.

Generate a corrected peer review report at /home/ga/Reports/peer_review_report.txt using the following format:

PEER REVIEW REPORT
==================
CASE: Peer_Review_Audit_2024
CASE_NUMBER: INV-PRA-006
IMAGE: ntfs_undel.dd
REVIEWER: Senior Investigator

FILESYSTEM_TYPE: <correct type>
VOLUME_LABEL: <correct label or 'No Label'>
TOTAL_FILES: <count of ALL regular files>
TOTAL_DIRECTORIES: <count of directories>
DELETED_FILES: <count of deleted files>
ALLOCATED_FILES: <count of allocated files>
LARGEST_FILE_NAME: <name of largest file>
LARGEST_FILE_SIZE: <size in bytes>

ERRORS FOUND IN PRELIMINARY REPORT:
ERROR 1: <description of discrepancy>
[... list all errors found ...]

TOTAL_ERRORS_FOUND: <N>
REVIEW_CONCLUSION: <brief assessment>

Additionally, provide an error summary at /home/ga/Reports/error_summary.txt with one line per error using the format: FIELD|PRELIMINARY_VALUE|CORRECT_VALUE|DISCREPANCY_TYPE
